personal.bio: Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications on React and TypeScript. Specialization: headless e-commerce, GraphQL data layers, performance optimization, modular UI systems, and React Native. Open to remote offers.
personal.skills: React, React Native, TypeScript, Redux, Zustand, React Query, Context API, Expo, Next.js, Vite, React Hook Form, SCSS/SASS, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, Shopify / Hydrogen, Custom Checkout Flows, Payment Gateways, Git, GitHub Actions, Jira, Figma, Postman, Sentry, Docker (basic), CI/CD, Responsive Design, Performance Optimization, BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy), HealthKit, Health Connect, Google Fit, OTA Firmware Updates, Push Notifications, WebView, Native Modules, Commander.js
personal.work_experience_text:
Senior Frontend Engineer @ ShellLogix (Oct 2021 – Present, Yerevan):
- Developed complex React and React Native applications for analytics platforms, e-commerce, and enterprise dashboards
- Designed modular frontend architecture and GraphQL-based data layers improving maintainability and API efficiency
- Built headless Shopify storefronts, custom checkout flows, and cross-platform mobile apps with modern state management
- Collaborated with international teams to deliver scalable web and mobile solutions for US and EU clients

Data Researcher / Editor @ Opta Sports by Stats Perform (Nov 2016 – Mar 2025, Yerevan / Remote):
- Managed and validated large-scale sports datasets across multiple leagues with 100% accuracy and strict deadlines
- Coordinated with global data teams to deliver real-time statistics to broadcasters and media partners
- Applied deep domain knowledge in sports data to build accurate filtering and statistics-heavy UIs

Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture Marketing & Business
Armenian National Agrarian University (Sep 2018 – Jun 2022, Yerevan, Armenia)
